description_long: This is a three-story apartment building with a flat, transparent roof structure and a brick facade. The front features three rows of symmetrically aligned windows, with a red-and-white striped awning above the main entrance on the ground floor. Decorative green vines climb the corners and lower sections of the building, adding a touch of nature to the urban exterior. The sides and rear of the building are simpler, with fewer or no windows and more visible brickwork. The building is framed by stone corner columns, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for a dense city neighborhood.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with a flat transparent roof, symmetrical windows, a striped awning entrance, and decorative green vines.
description_view_0: Front view showing three floors of windows, the main entrance with a red-and-white awning, and green vines on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view with plain brick walls, stone corner columns, and minimal vine growth; no windows are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with three rows of windows similar to the front, but without an entrance or awning; some vines are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with plain brick walls and more extensive vine coverage on the lower levels.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in three horizontal rows, with each floor having evenly spaced rectangular windows aligned vertically and horizontally.
